title: BLT Chicken Salad
summary: It’s a BLT in salad form. Juicy chicken, crispy bacon and a tomato dressing that brings everything together. High protein meal prep done right.

method.description: Butterfly the chicken breasts and season them generously with salt and pepper.
Add the bacon to a frying pan and place over a medium heat. Cook for 4–5 mins, until crispy and golden on both sides. Transfer to a plate, keeping the fat in the pan.
Add the chicken breasts to the same pan. Cook for 10–15 mins, flipping occasionally, until golden and cooked through.

Meanwhile, pick the parsley leaves and discard the stems. Chop the tomatoes (for the salad) into bite-sized chunks. Remove any tough kale stalks and add the leaves to a large bowl. Season with salt and massage for a couple of minutes until soft and wilted.

Make the dressing. Halve the tomato and coarsely grate the cut side into a bowl, discarding the skins. Crumble in half of the cooked bacon. Stir through the olive oil and season with salt, black pepper and a splash of sherry vinegar, to taste.
Add the parsley, chopped tomatoes, quinoa and tomato dressing to the bowl of kale. Toss everything together until well combined.

Slice the cooked chicken breasts. Share the salad between Tupperware containers and top with the chicken. Finish with the remaining crumbled bacon and a generous crack of black pepper. Once cooled, box up and pop in the fridge, ready for tomorrow’s lunch — they’ll keep for up to 3 days.

chefs.name: Chloe René
chefs.summary: Chloe (@chlo_eat) takes inspiration from her diverse upbringing to create recipes and dishes influenced from cultures around the world. Despite her classical training, Chloe's philosophy in the kitchen revolves around simplicity and home-cooking. She firmly believes that the essence of a great meal lies in the quality of ingredients and the care put into their preparation. Instead of relying on complex and technical processes, Chloe prizes the art of letting ingredients shine through, enhancing their natural flavours with a delicate touch.
